pages.page_purpose: Hook — Static hears the signal; the wrong-rhythm mast

panels.location: Zoo City rooftop, night, after rain
panels.camera_angle: medium-wide, squad strung along rooftop edge
panels.action: Static stopped dead, one mitten hand cupped to his ear, listening hard; the others turn back
panels.visual_notes: Patch at line's end (travels with squad now); DEEP BG: tiny red-masked silhouette on far rooftop (Super cameo — findable, not featured)
panels.continuity_notes: Ear-cup listening beat (headphones removed from canon, ERR-2026-07-06); Patch squad-adjacent resolves Issue 05 threshold; cameo keeps Super teaser warm

panels.location: Rooftop POV toward Old Quarter skyline
panels.camera_angle: wide POV past squad's backs to horizon
panels.action: Ancient relay mast rises from the Old Quarter, one red light blinking in a stuttering WRONG rhythm
panels.caption: FusionZoo shut the old network down years ago. Someone forgot to tell the network.
panels.visual_notes: Signal palette established: amber/red. NO green this issue
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — the Signal, first appearance

pages.page_purpose: Debate — rescue / loop / trap; Patch leads without explaining

panels.action: NeonBlue lights up, halfway to the fire escape; TwoTone listens, head tilted, analytical
panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "It's a distress call. Someone needs us!" / TWOTONE: "It repeats. It's a loop."
panels.visual_notes: NeonBlue earnest this issue — no ad-copy face
panels.continuity_notes: Idea beats: NeonBlue believes rescue; TwoTone hears structure

panels.action: Moodz stares at the far blink, unconvinced, arms crossed; fringe catches the distant red
panels.visual_notes: Red blink reflection as the only warm tone on him

panels.camera_angle: medium, Patch facing away toward the mast
panels.action: Patch already walking toward the signal, alone, unasked; NeonBlue calling after him
panels.dialogue: PATCH: "…home frequency." / NEONBLUE: "The what? Patch — the WHAT?"
panels.caption: Patch doesn't explain things. Mostly, he doesn't know how anymore.
panels.visual_notes: The squad follows a zombie for the first time
panels.continuity_notes: Idea beat: Patch recognizes, won't explain; HOW stays unrevealed

pages.page_purpose: Descent — the Old Quarter; Relay 1 door; the warm console

panels.action: Squad descends into the Old Quarter: pre-neon architecture, dead cable bundles sagging like vines, analog signage, only the mast's red blink for light; Patch leading
panels.emotion: walking into a museum nobody curates
panels.caption: The Old Quarter. Zoo City's first draft. The city never tore it down. It just stopped looking.
panels.visual_notes: NEW LOCATION — plate required; rounder/older architecture; cables-as-vines motif
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — Old Quarter first appearance

panels.action: Squad at the door; the signal now felt as vibration lines off the doorframe; amber seam light
panels.visual_notes: Stencil 'FUSIONZOO RELAY 1 — AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL' applied at lettering; AMBER seam not green

panels.camera_angle: close on ancient console, one live screen
panels.action: One screen alive among dead ones, pulsing a slow amber heartbeat waveform; Moodz's mitt hovers, not touching
panels.visual_notes: Heartbeat waveform = the signal made visible; SFX small, rhythmic
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — Relay 1 interior; console = Ed.4 tech one generation older

panels.camera_angle: wide, slightly low, down the hall
panels.action: Between rows of dead prototype chambers stand THE PENDING — monkeys rendered as clean lineart with UNFINISHED COLOR (patches of fill missing), outlines flickering between two silhouettes. Not shambling. WAITING — a queue that stopped moving thirteen years ago. Squad small at the doorway
panels.caption: Modern fusion is all-or-nothing. The machines guarantee it now. / These are from before the guarantee.
panels.visual_notes: DECLARED ART EXCEPTION (issue-scoped): Pending break flat-color rule ON PURPOSE — everything else obeys bible fully so the exception reads as condition, not drift. Amber only. NOT zombies: no brains, no green, no decay
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — the Pending. Tech grounding: nft_fusion_reference.md §5 (atomicity is modern; prototypes predate it)

pages.page_purpose: Contact — 'Is it done yet?' / the consent boundary / Patch knows this room

panels.action: A Pending monkey turns to them — polite, patient, outline quietly flickering between two head shapes
panels.caption: They've been asking since the experiments ended. Thirteen years. Same question.
panels.visual_notes: Microwave-popcorn casualness; the horror is the patience
panels.continuity_notes: The Pending speak normally (unlike the Stayed's chant) — unresolved, not degraded

panels.action: NeonBlue steps forward hands-out helper-mode; the Pending recoils, flicker SPIKES — outline stuttering hard
panels.dialogue: NEONBLUE: "We can get help — there are new machines, they could finish—" / PENDING: "Don't. Touch. The state."
panels.visual_notes: Flicker intensity = distress meter; earnest face not salesman face
panels.continuity_notes: Consent theme; 'the state' is literal singleton-state language (nft_fusion_reference.md §4)

panels.action: While the others talk, Patch rests his mitt flat on a secondary console like it's a gravestone. He knows this room
panels.visual_notes: Patch's stillness = grief; the Pending's stillness = queueing — stage the difference
panels.continuity_notes: HOW Patch knows Relay 1 = deliberately unanswered; do not foreshadow in art

pages.page_purpose: Turn — the Keeper's vigil; the only good question

panels.location: Relay 1 control room, behind the main console
panels.camera_angle: over-console angle revealing the floor behind it
panels.action: Behind the console: FRESH jury-rigged power splices, new cable ties, a folded tarp bed. Screen scrolls: 'STATE: PENDING — AWAITING FINALIZATION — DAY 4,749' (text at lettering)
panels.emotion: mystery lands — not abandonment, a vigil
panels.visual_notes: Keeper = EVIDENCE ONLY, no figure/shadow/silhouette; fresh cable ties vs ancient dust contrast
panels.continuity_notes: NEW LORE — the Keeper (unseen); DAY 4,749 ≈ 13 years; open thread: who keeps the vigil

panels.camera_angle: medium-wide, Moodz between squad and the Pending
panels.action: The Pending gathered — present, flickering softly, not hostile. Moodz steps forward, lowers his shoulders, asks the question nobody has asked in thirteen years
panels.emotion: the turn: from 'what should we do' to 'what do you want'
panels.dialogue: MOODZ: "Then what do you want?" / THE PENDING (together, small): "Company."
panels.visual_notes: Flicker SETTLES as they answer; give the balloons air
panels.continuity_notes: Moodz growth panel — asks calmly what he once screamed; consent thesis continuity Ed.4→05→06

pages.page_purpose: Land — the visit; Scarline's verdict; Patch's offering

panels.action: WORDLESS. The squad stays a while. Static sits cross-legged next to a Pending monkey doing the same; Ash shares his doorframe lean; NeonBlue listens to one. Nobody fixes anything
panels.caption: Some rescues are just visits.
panels.visual_notes: THE panel of the issue; amber warmth at maximum; flickers at their calmest
panels.continuity_notes: Static grounding pose canon since Ed.4; visual rule: attention stabilizes the Pending

panels.action: Squad files out; Moodz looks back, Issue 05's open-door guilt resurfacing; Scarline stops beside him
panels.dialogue: SCARLINE: "Leaving isn't abandoning if you come back."
panels.visual_notes: Her steady, him unsteady, door light between them
panels.continuity_notes: Scarline's ONE line; thesis line; squad's standing return-promise → ledger

panels.camera_angle: close on console edge, Patch's mitt exiting frame
panels.action: Last to leave, Patch places his crumpled pastel recall notice from Issue 05 flat on the console beside the heartbeat screen. Smooths it once. Leaves
panels.visual_notes: The notice must read as THE Issue 05 prop (same pastel, crumpled, rain-spotted); NO caption — silence is the point
panels.continuity_notes: PROP CONTINUITY: recall notice carried since Issue 05 P08_PANEL02; Patch gives the waiting what worked on him
references_required: Issue 05 notice prop ref (P01_PANEL02 selected art when generated)

pages.page_purpose: Door-to-next — walking out; RETURN PROTOCOL INITIATED

panels.location: Old Quarter street, first grey of dawn
panels.camera_angle: wide from behind, mast receding above rooflines
panels.action: The squad walks out. Nobody talks for a block. Patch walks INSIDE the group now, not at the end of the line
panels.dialogue: ASH: "They waved." / STATIC: "Danger level: one. The good kind."
panels.visual_notes: Bookend of P3.1 reversed; Patch's position = one-panel arc
panels.continuity_notes: Danger meter third beat; return-promise now canon

panels.camera_angle: static shot, console alone, notice beside screen
panels.action: Empty room. The heartbeat waveform stutters — then changes rhythm. Screen refreshes: 'SIGNAL ACKNOWLEDGED — RETURN PROTOCOL INITIATED' (text at lettering)
panels.caption: It was never calling for help. It was calling something back.
panels.visual_notes: Identical framing to P3.3 (rhyme), unoccupied; heartbeat SFX doubles; the notice sits in frame
panels.continuity_notes: NEW OPEN THREAD — Return Protocol; WHAT answers stays unrevealed; rear cover echoes with second light
